# VTOKU Cam

> VTOKU Cam turns an iPhone or iPad into a virtual camera and a standalone AR VTuber camera. It
> connects to Warudo and other VMC and NDI tools. Track the device in real space, perform a VRM
> avatar in AR with face tracking, record
> video, and go live anywhere with SRT and SRTLA bonded streaming. By VTOKU LLC (Honolulu, Hawai‘i).
> iOS and iPadOS 26. Free to use; an optional one-time Pro unlock adds NDI|HX and a commercial-use
> license. Currently in free TestFlight beta. Brand tagline: "Go VRL" (VR meets IRL).

## What you can do
- Use your phone as a moving virtual camera in Warudo (sends camera pose over the network).
- Perform a VRM avatar in AR with real-time face tracking, plus idle and dance motion. (Full-body motion tracking is coming soon.)
- Hide the avatar behind real-world objects with on-device occlusion (LiDAR plus a neural depth model), defocus her with lens-accurate depth of field, and grade the frame with the Screen FX anime look.
- Record your performance to video, send and receive NDI, output over HDMI, or go live over SRT/SRTLA.
- Go live anywhere, bonding Wi-Fi and cellular with SRTLA so the stream holds up on the move.
- Link a remote performer with VRL Link: receive their motion and voice to drive the avatar, and send your camera, video, and audio back.
- Drive the avatar from any webcam with the VRL Link web sender, free browser face, upper-body, and hand tracking at https://vtoku.cam/face.html (no install; tracking stays on device, video is never broadcast).
- Works standalone (no PC) and scales into a Warudo or NDI studio setup.

## Key pages
- Home: https://vtoku.cam/
- Documentation: https://vtoku.cam/docs/
- Connect with Warudo: https://vtoku.cam/docs/warudo.html
- Look and camera (occlusion, depth of field, Screen FX, HDMI): https://vtoku.cam/docs/look-camera.html
- Bonded live streaming (SRT/SRTLA): https://vtoku.cam/docs/streaming.html
- VRL Link (remote performer link): https://vtoku.cam/docs/vrl-link.html
- VRL Link web sender (browser tracking into a VRL Link session): https://vtoku.cam/face.html
- Support and FAQ: https://vtoku.cam/support.html
- Join the beta: https://vtoku.cam/beta.html
- Privacy Policy: https://vtoku.cam/privacy.html
- Terms and EULA: https://vtoku.cam/terms.html

## Notes
- Audience: VTubers, IRL streamers, animators, and virtual-production creators, especially Warudo users.
- Privacy: camera, microphone, and face data are processed on device; the app collects no user data.
- Contact: support@vtoku.com
